mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, key, name, description, scope_type, rules, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_scope (id, workspace_id, key, name, description, scope_type, rules, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{key}, #{name}, #{description}, #{scopeType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{rulesJson}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_scope SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, rules = #{rulesJson}, scope_type = #{scopeType, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
